name: bhatbot
description: Personal Jarvis-style desktop agent that reads CLAUDE.md as live context
author: Siddhant Bhat

scripts.verify: node scripts/verify-syntax.js && node scripts/test-upgrade.js && node scripts/test-tools-extract.js && node scripts/test-configsec.js && node scripts/test-reflect-security.js && node scripts/test-selfheal.js && node scripts/test-patrol.js && node scripts/test-introspect.js && node scripts/test-admission.js && node scripts/test-narrate.js && node scripts/test-runtime-state.js && node scripts/test-toolselect.js && node scripts/test-window-manager.js && node scripts/test-history.js && node scripts/test-selfdrive.js && node scripts/test-health.js && node scripts/test-opsstatus.js && node scripts/test-main-helpers.js && node scripts/test-fleet-spill.js && node scripts/test-codescan.js && node scripts/test-speech.js && node scripts/test-agent-relay.js && node scripts/test-blackboard.js && node scripts/test-orchestrator-dag.js && node scripts/test-sandboxexec.js && node scripts/test-fleet.js && node scripts/test-integrations.js && node scripts/test-scicompute.js && node scripts/test-endpoint.js && node scripts/test-rate-live.js && node scripts/test-abort-pairing.js && node scripts/test-attach.js && node scripts/test-endpoint-integration.js && node scripts/test-spokenmodel.js && node scripts/test-spoken-feedback.js && node scripts/test-speech-planner.js && node scripts/test-ttsws.js && node scripts/test-orchestrator-board.js && node scripts/test-parallel-tools.js && node scripts/test-procedural.js && node scripts/test-projects-build.js && node scripts/test-imagesearch.js && node scripts/test-studioscene.js && node scripts/test-voicegate.js && node scripts/test-action-guard.js
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify && npm run test:browser && npm run smoke && npm run eval

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Bhatbot listens for voice commands and the wake word.
extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Bhatbot controls apps (Spotify, System Events, window management) on your behalf.
extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Bhatbot can capture images for vision tasks when you ask.
